calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-13-2019 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Bovarnik for Leonard Hurwitt (Petitioner).
Kevin Rehwald appeared by telephone for Telesia Niu (Petitioner).

Mr. Rehwald stated that they are a creditor, that they have since settled their claim, that they have a payment date in two weeks, and that once payment happens, they will drop their petition. The Court stated that it does not want Ms. Niu's petition just hanging out there. The Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Telesia Niu is off calendar. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary filed by Leonard Hurwitt is continued to February 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Bavarnik is to let the Court know as soon as possible if his petition can go off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
